title: Doric Weekly Market Insight
summary:
"China's home prices slightly up in January."
By Michalis Voutsinas
Wintertime in Greece, much like in the spot market, can be harsher than expected, with low temperatures and cloudy skies. However, every year in the heart of winter there is a small, rejuvenating "taste of spring". These warm, comforting days drenched in sunshine are what they call "Halcyon days".

children.title: "China's home prices slightly up in January."
